subcodes.first_line: Every soul hath been given its book; verily, the wicked read their book while the righteous have this Manifest Book [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اوتیت کل نفس کتابها ان الاشرار یقرون کتابا و الابرار هذا الکتاب المبین
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
